violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of plastic cups and lids were stored on the floor in the stockroom.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Establishment does not have a hand sink. There is only a three compartment sink. There is not a hand sink in the food prep area. Establishment remodeled and eliminated the hand sink and expanded to a new kitchen area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
